description: Feroce for men from tonino lamborghini comes in a dark, mystical flacon designed by Cent Degres. The fragrance has dominant notes of cardamom, nutmeg, vetiver, cinnamon, oak moss, sandalwood and patchouli.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
